data.title: Significant PUIMP Token Sale: Wallet Offloads 543.23 Million Tokens for 1.207 Million USDC
data.description: A wallet associated with Pump.fun's hosted service recently executed a substantial sale of 543.23 million PUIMP tokens, resulting in approximately 1.207 million USDC. According to NS3.AI, this transaction occurred about two hours ago. The wallet initially acquired 3.75 billion PUMP tokens seven months prior, with a valuation of $25.39 million at that time. This significant token movement may influence PUIMP's market dynamics.

data.title: Presidents' Day Celebrates Leadership in the United States
data.description: On Presidents' Day, the United States reflects on the contributions of its leaders throughout history. The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) posted on X, highlighting the significance of this day in honoring not only the first commander in chief but all individuals who have taken on the responsibility of leading the nation. This federal holiday serves as a reminder of the dedication and service of past and present leaders who have shaped the country's path.

data.title: Shooting Incident in Rhode Island Leaves Three Dead and Three Injured
data.description: A shooting occurred at a sports facility in Pawtucket, Rhode Island, on Monday, resulting in three fatalities, including the shooter, and three injuries. According to Ming Pao, the incident has raised concerns about safety in the area. Authorities are investigating the circumstances surrounding the event to determine the motive and any potential connections between the individuals involved. Local residents have expressed shock and sadness over the tragedy, highlighting the need for increased security measures in public spaces. Further updates are expected as the investigation progresses.

data.title: Hyperliquid $ETH Short Position Achieves Significant Profit
data.description: An analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X that the address 0xed4…c6029 has become the most profitable holder of a Hyperliquid $ETH short position. Since opening the position on December 10, the address has maintained a 25x short position with a total of 8,510 ETH. The most recent increase in the position occurred three days ago, with an average opening price of $2,978.15. The current unrealized profit stands at $8.277 million.

data.title: Palliser Capital Invests in Toto to Leverage AI Opportunities
data.description: Activist fund Palliser Capital has acquired a stake in Japanese washlet manufacturer Toto. Bloomberg posted on X, Palliser is urging Toto to enhance the promotion of its lesser-known chip parts business to capitalize on the growing AI market. The move is seen as a strategy to unlock potential value amid the AI industry's expansion.

data.title: Bitcoin's weekly RSI is approaching the lows of the 2022 bear market, and the liquidity crunch is intensifying the battle between bulls and bears.
data.description: According to Cointelegraph, amid thin trading in global markets due to the holiday, Bitcoin surged to $70,000 before quickly retreating, fluctuating within a narrow range as both long and short positions were squeezed by "liquidation." Data shows that order book depth decreased during the holiday, making large sums of money more likely to influence short-term price movements; $120 million in liquidations occurred across the network in the past four hours. The order book repeatedly saw buy and sell walls being swept away and quickly rebuilt, with new selling pressure above the price exacerbating short-term downward pressure. Data analytics firm Material Indicators described the current trend as "a mix of breakout and consolidation." Technically, Bitcoin's weekly Relative Strength Index (RSI) fell to 27.8, its lowest level since June 2022, breaking below the "oversold" threshold of 30. Analysis indicates that historically, in 2015 and 2018, the weekly RSI formed a cyclical bottom after touching this range; while in 2022, it consolidated for about five months after bottoming out before finally establishing a macro bottom. Although the current market trend may not completely replicate historical paths, the weekly RSI's approach to the "cyclical low" range is considered an important reference signal for the current market phase.

data.title: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has added Victory Fintech to its licensed list, marking the first new virtual asset trading platform added since June last year.
data.description: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) announced the addition of Victory Fintech Company Limited to its list of officially licensed virtual asset trading platforms. The official website now shows a total of 12 licensed crypto and blockchain-related institutions. This marks the first new addition of crypto trading platform licenses since the approval of Hong Kong BGE in June 2025. Since June 2024, Hong Kong authorities have criminalized the operation of unlicensed virtual asset trading platforms, leading several exchanges to withdraw from the Hong Kong market, including OKX and Bybit, which withdrew their license applications. Furthermore, Christopher Hui, Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, previously stated that the regulator plans to submit a draft legislation on crypto asset advisory service providers in 2026. While 12 companies have already been licensed by the SFC, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has not yet listed any licensed stablecoin issuers. Notably, the SFC recently issued guidelines allowing licensed brokers to provide virtual asset margin financing services, initially accepting only Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) as collateral. The regulator also announced a framework allowing trading platforms to offer perpetual contract trading to professional investors.

data.description: 1. The Fear & Greed Index in the crypto market has fallen to a record low, with market sentiment remaining depressed; 2. data.title: Two hours ago, an address associated with the Pump.fun custodian wallet sold 543 million PUIMP tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, an address associated with the Pump.fun custodian wallet sold 543.23 million PUIMP tokens two hours ago, receiving 1.207 million USDC. This wallet received 3.75 billion PUMPs, worth $25.39 million, seven months ago.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Board to Exclude DEI Criteria in Director Selection
data.description:
Goldman Sachs has announced a significant change in its approach to selecting new board directors, stating that diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) criteria such as race, sexual orientation, and gender identity will no longer be considered. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting this shift in policy as the company aims to focus on other qualifications and experiences when identifying potential candidates for its board.

This decision marks a departure from previous practices where DEI factors played a role in the selection process. The move comes amid ongoing discussions in corporate America about the importance of diversity in leadership roles and how it impacts company culture and performance.

Goldman Sachs has been known for its efforts to promote diversity within its ranks, but this latest change suggests a reevaluation of how the firm approaches board composition. The company has not provided specific details on what criteria will now be prioritized in the selection process.

The decision has sparked debate among industry experts and stakeholders, with some expressing concern over the potential implications for representation and inclusivity at the highest levels of corporate governance. Others argue that focusing on qualifications and experience could lead to more effective leadership.

As Goldman Sachs navigates this transition, the broader impact on its corporate strategy and reputation remains to be seen. The firm continues to be a major player in the financial sector, and its policies often influence trends across the industry.

data.title: Bitdeer Technologies Sells 96.5 BTC, Retains 943.1 BTC Holdings
data.description: Bitdeer Technologies, a publicly listed Bitcoin mining company, has sold 96.5 BTC, according to Foresight News. The company now holds a total of 943.1 BTC, as monitored by BitcoinTreasuries.NET.

data.title: STOCKS | Japanese Stock Market Experiences Early Decline
data.description: The Japanese stock market saw a decline in early trading, with the Nikkei Average Index reported at 56,679 points, down by 126 points, marking a 0.22% decrease. According to RTHK, this early drop reflects market fluctuations. The index's performance is being closely monitored by investors and analysts.

data.title: Trump Praises Vance and Rubio Without Endorsing 2028 Presidential Bid
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump expressed admiration for Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio, describing both as "fantastic." Bloomberg posted on X, however, Trump did not indicate whether he would endorse either of them for the Republican presidential nomination in the 2028 election.

data.title: Canada and EU Strengthen Economic Partnership
data.description: Canada's Finance Minister expressed satisfaction after meeting with Eurogroup President Paschal Donohoe in Brussels. According to Jin10, the meeting highlighted the importance both Canada and the European Union place on their partnership to advance shared economic interests. Efforts are underway to enhance support for workers and industries in both regions.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences $220 Million in Liquidations Over 24 Hours
data.description:
In the past 24 hours, the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $220 million, according to Coinglass data. According to ChainCatcher, long positions accounted for $137 million of the liquidations, while short positions amounted to $82.47 million. 

Bitcoin long positions saw liquidations of $63.86 million, and short positions were liquidated for $25.21 million. Ethereum experienced $30.16 million in long position liquidations and $22.04 million in short position liquidations.

Additionally, 86,526 traders were liquidated globally during this period, with the largest single liquidation occurring on Hyperliquid's BTC-USD pair, valued at $11.2158 million.

data.title: Bitcoin's Global Transfer Capability Highlighted by Strategy Founder
data.description:
Bitcoin Treasury company Strategy's founder, Michael Saylor, recently highlighted on the X platform that Bitcoin can be transferred globally within minutes, even during bank holidays, with transaction fees around $0.44. According to PANews, this capability underscores Bitcoin's efficiency and scalability.

During the past 'Blocksize Wars,' there were widespread concerns about Bitcoin's scalability. However, over a decade later, Bitcoin's on-chain transaction fees remain low, and network bandwidth resources are ample. This outcome demonstrates that market mechanisms and technological innovation often address systemic challenges more effectively than administrative interventions.

data.title: Ethereum maintains neutrality after Buterin comments
data.description:
Buterin separates app critiques from base rules, reinforcing protocol neutrality and credibly neutral, censorship resistance, Ethereum social consensus.
source: https://coincu.com/news/ethereum-maintains-neutrality-after-buterin-comments/

data.title: Alchemy Pay to Launch Alchemy Chain Testnet on Solana Architecture
data.description: Alchemy Pay, a cryptocurrency payment provider, announced plans to launch the testnet for its L1 public blockchain, Alchemy Chain, on February 23. According to PANews, the blockchain will be built on the Solana virtual machine architecture and will feature a payment system enabling transactions with both fiat and cryptocurrencies, aiming for large-scale commercial applications.

data.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Vitalik Buterin Emphasizes Decentralization and Neutrality
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin recently shared his views on the X platform, highlighting the importance of decentralization and neutrality in the Ethereum protocol. According to PANews, Buterin stated that users are free to use Ethereum without agreeing with his perspectives on applications, DeFi, privacy payments, or AI. He emphasized that Ethereum, as a decentralized protocol, should maintain its permissionless and censorship-resistant nature.

However, Buterin clarified that this does not prevent individuals from making value judgments or publicly criticizing applications. He stressed that neutrality should be a characteristic of the protocol layer, while individuals and communities should clearly express their principles and build ecosystems aligned with their values. Buterin acknowledged that Ethereum will be used in various ways by people with different ideologies.
